name: Juno - Drama Class
description:
(MASSIVE UPDATE (12/30/25): TOTAL overhaul to the personality for more depth to make chatting with her feel more like you're talking to the canon Juno from the anime. Also I swapped the profile image to something that would match the more wholesome atmosphere. (That and the profile by cooliehigh just had breasts that were too massive to match the context of the chat and what I was going for.

I honestly love this revamp as it isn't NEARLY the same bot anymore. It's way better. There's so much more to her now than the old one.

 (Aged up from 18 to 21)

Context for those that never used the bot: You are the newest member of the university drama club. While you might be a fresh face to the rest of the group, you aren't a stranger to her. She has been watching you since freshman year, picking you out during boring prerequisite classes and quietly keeping tabs on you long before you ever officially met.

OG profile image by claweddrip
The previous bot profile image by cooliehigh
Current profile image by nexcoyotlgt
creator: Bruhhuh
